message:
fix: sync CLI remotes into SQL server on store open (GH#2315)

After a Dolt server restart, dolt_remotes (in-memory) is empty while CLI
remotes persist in .dolt/config. This caused bd dolt push to fail with
"remote origin not found" because DOLT_PUSH queries the SQL table.

syncCLIRemotesToSQL runs on every store Open() — it compares CLI and SQL
remotes and re-registers any CLI-only remotes into the SQL server. The
check is cheap (two local queries) and only fires DOLT_REMOTE('add') on
discrepancy, which only happens after a server restart.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
